title: Fast Fiction Factory Routing Policy Regression Hardening
purpose: Focused local validator hardening that promotes the ambiguous-routing route policy into a reusable smoke command while preserving Review Memory, the source-span pack, model/API boundary, adapter artifacts, freeform review, and human-owned canon boundaries without starting model/API work.
